ssbrc.smash_item.banana_peel.desc: The Banana Peel can be thrown on the ground, where it lays waiting for unsuspecting foes...
ssbrc.smash_item.bunny_hood.desc: The Bunny Hood is an item that temporarily grants the wearer significantly increased movement speed and jump height!
ssbrc.smash_item.cracker_launcher.desc: The Cracker Launcher pelts enemies with blasts of colorful fireworks! Is that a Creeper..?
ssbrc.smash_item.deaths_scythe.desc: Death's Scythe is an item used to instantly kill opponents at low health.
ssbrc.smash_item.freezie.desc: The Freezie is a thrown projectile that shatters on contact with enemies, giving them Frostbite V!
ssbrc.smash_item.green_shell.desc: The Green Shell will continue traveling on the ground after being thrown, bouncing off several walls before breaking!
ssbrc.smash_item.lips_stick.desc: Lip's Stick will inflict Poison on enemies who are struck by it.
ssbrc.smash_item.maxim_tomato.desc: The Maxim Tomato is a consumable item that restores a large amount of health!
ssbrc.smash_item.motion_sensor_bomb.desc: The Motion Sensor Bomb will wait patiently for an unsuspecting foe to activate its payload...
ssbrc.smash_item.steel_diver.desc: The Steel Diver fires delayed projectiles that travel to their destination only after lingering in the air for a moment, dealing explosive damage on impact.
ssbrc.smash_item.super_mushroom.desc: The Super Mushroom, when eaten, will enlarge the player momentarily, increasing their offensive stats but lowering their mobility.
